svg.title: Synalux POS — menu Uuilder
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for menu Uuilder. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: All menu data stored in DB -- no rebuild needed for content changes. i18n via name_i18n jsonb
8 items | drag to reorder | click to edit
desc_i18n jsonb -- same pattern as name_i18n
choose 1 | required | Marinara, Ranch, Honey Mustard, BBQ
Grays out on register and online menu
Synalux POS | Menu Builder | All content stored in pos_menu_items -- no hardcodes, no rebuilds
